_schema_doc: Inputs for scripts/record_fraser_cassettes.py. Each entry drives ONE LLM call on the real API; the response is saved to tests/cassettes/fraser/<case_id>.json keyed by sha256(model:prompt)[:16] in the same shape core.llm._save_fixture writes. Re-record by re-running the script with RAHAT_FIXTURE_RECORD=1; replay is automatic when LLM_FIXTURE_DIR is set to this directory.

cases.prompt:
[Workout Card NOTES enrichment] Write a 2-3 sentence coaching note explaining why this adapted workout matches the user's state today. Voice: direct, technical, prescriptive. No fluff. Quote the structural rationale's key facts in plainer English.

Context:
```json
{
  "source_title": "\"Pikachu's Thunderbolt\"",
  "structural_why": "Adapted from gym programming 'Pikachu's Thunderbolt'. HRV=33, recovery=red, tier=zone2, active injuries=0.",
  "substitutions": ["power_snatch \u2192 floor_press (HRV-red overhead swap)"],
  "hrv": 33,
  "recovery_color": "red",
  "tier": "zone2",
  "injuries": []
}
```

Respond with the coaching note ONLY — no preamble, no JSON, no markdown headings.

[Workout Card NOTES enrichment] Write a 2-3 sentence coaching note explaining why this adapted workout matches the user's state today. Voice: direct, technical, prescriptive. No fluff. Quote the structural rationale's key facts in plainer English.

Context:
```json
{
  "source_title": "Rest Day",
  "structural_why": "Rest day per your gym programming. Active-recovery flow below is Fraser's suggestion, not gym-prescribed — skip if you'd rather take a full off day.",
  "substitutions": [],
  "hrv": 55,
  "recovery_color": "green",
  "tier": "zone2",
  "injuries": []
}
```

Respond with the coaching note ONLY — no preamble, no JSON, no markdown headings.

[Workout Card NOTES enrichment] Write a 2-3 sentence coaching note for today's adapted workout (Lava Plume — 6 rounds of 400m run + farmers carry + wall sit). User is HRV-green, no injuries, zone-2 tier. Voice: direct, technical.
